name: Bodyweight Squat
description: A fundamental lower body exercise targeting quads, glutes, and hamstrings. Keep your feet shoulder-width apart, chest up, and sink your hips back as if sitting in a chair.

name: Standard Push-up
description: An upper body pushing exercise for chest, shoulders, and triceps. Maintain a high plank position, lower your chest towards the floor by bending at the elbows, and push back up.

name: Dumbbell Bench Press
description: A compound movement for chest and triceps using dumbbells on a flat bench. Offers a greater range of motion than a barbell bench press.

name: Pull-up
description: A challenging upper body pulling exercise for the back and biceps. Hang from a bar with palms facing away and pull your body up until your chin is over the bar.

name: Cable Lat Pulldown
description: A machine-based exercise for building back width. Sit at the machine and pull the bar down to your upper chest while squeezing your shoulder blades together.

name: Dumbbell Bicep Curl
description: An isolation exercise for the biceps. Hold dumbbells at your sides and curl them towards your shoulders while keeping your elbows stationary.
